variables.notes: No single explicit populated SG&A total row exists. Chose broad overhead buckets above operating result and excluded direct costs ('Materials and Services'), D&A, impairments, and totals. Did not separately add 'Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses' or 'Marketing and communication Expense' because they appear to be subcomponents within 'Other Operating Expenses', so adding them would risk double counting.
No dedicated research/development line is visible above or below operating result in the provided income statement.
